# Decision Log

<!-- Auto-generated by scripts/regen-decision-log.sh from home-assistant/docs/decisions.md frontmatter. -->
<!-- Do not edit by hand — your changes will be overwritten. -->
<!-- Most recent at top. -->

## 2026-05 — ADR-010: Claude Code on a dedicated dev LXC

**Status:** accepted

Run Claude Code (Node CLI under tmux) in a dedicated unprivileged Debian LXC (CT 101), on the tailnet, separate from Forgejo.

→ [home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-010](../home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-010)

## 2026-05 — ADR-009: Native LXC over Docker for homelab services on Proxmox

**Status:** accepted

Default to one native unprivileged LXC per service; reach for Docker only when an app ships compose-only and porting is genuinely impractical.

→ [home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-009](../home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-009)

## 2026-05 — ADR-008: Tailscale for off-network access to the homelab

**Status:** accepted

Install Tailscale on each LXC that needs external reachability; route via the Tailscale mesh.

→ [home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-008](../home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-008)

## 2026-05 — ADR-007: Forgejo on a native LXC for self-hosted git

**Status:** accepted

Run Forgejo as a native binary in an unprivileged Debian LXC on Proxmox (CT 100), backed by SQLite, exposed over Tailscale.

→ [home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-007](../home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-007)

## 2024-12 — ADR-006: Resideo Panel as Z-Wave Hub + Wall Interface

**Status:** accepted

Use the Resideo panel as a Z-Wave hub, a wall-mounted HomeKit interface for HA, and a local sensor platform via AlarmDecoder, with HA remaining the brain.

→ [home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-006](../home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-006)

## 2024-12 — ADR-005: Mix of Inovelli and Shelly Switches

**Status:** accepted

Use Inovelli Blue switches for high-traffic and scene-control areas (15 switches) and Shelly relays for shallow boxes and aesthetic-preserving locations (10 units).

→ [home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-005](../home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-005)

## 2024-12 — ADR-004: Nabu Casa Cloud for Remote Access

**Status:** accepted

Subscribe to Nabu Casa Cloud ($6.50/month) for remote access and Apple Home integration.

→ [home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-004](../home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-004)

## 2024-12 — ADR-003: Network Segmentation with VLANs

**Status:** accepted

Implement VLAN segmentation with separate trusted, IoT, guest, and server VLANs, plus firewall rules that allow trusted-to-IoT control but block IoT-to-trusted access.

→ [home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-003](../home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-003)

## 2024-12 — ADR-002: Zigbee as Primary Device Protocol

**Status:** accepted

Use Zigbee 3.0 as the primary protocol, falling back to WiFi only where no Zigbee alternative exists.

→ [home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-002](../home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-002)

## 2024-12 — ADR-001: Home Assistant as Core Platform

**Status:** accepted

Use Home Assistant OS as the core smart home brain.

→ [home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-001](../home-assistant/docs/decisions.md#adr-001)
